_doc: Body-confirmed, human-style judgments of codeweb overlap.mjs findings on axios (corpus.manifest sha a209bfb). EXTERNAL VALIDITY, NOT EXACT GROUND TRUTH: each label is a manual verdict made by reading the real function bodies of the cluster members (true duplicate = same logic, a developer would consolidate; coincidental = same name, materially different logic / the name-grouping conflates unrelated functions). Synthetic corpora (detection-accuracy.mjs) carry the EXACT generator-planted ground truth; THIS file is the real-world triangulation point per PRE-REGISTRATION 3.1 and is treated as weaker evidence. Labels written by inspecting bodies BEFORE computing precision. unit = one overlap finding (a same-name cross-file cluster). Scope = codeweb's reported findings (confidence high|medium, i.e. what overlap.mjs surfaces as a finding); low/refuted are codeweb-dismissed and listed separately for transparency. Baseline (name-match-only) treats EVERY same-name multi-file cluster as a positive; so its positives include all the high/medium AND all the low/refuted clusters below.

findings.title: MockXMLHttpRequest
findings.rationale: identical XHR-mock class copied verbatim across 14 browser test files

findings.title: addEventListener
findings.rationale: same empty 'addEventListener() {}' XHR-mock stub repeated across the 14 mock classes

findings.title: RequestHeader
findings.rationale: byte-identical setRequestHeader(key,value) mock body in all 14 files

findings.title: send
findings.rationale: identical send(data){this.params=data;requests.push(this)} XHR-mock method

findings.title: env
findings.rationale: identical env(fetch)=>({fetch,Request,Response}) helper copied across smoke tests

findings.title: createTransportCapture
findings.rationale: same capture-transport factory replicated across 8 smoke tests (minor drift)

findings.title: getLastRequest
findings.rationale: identical getLastRequest() helper (requests.at(-1)+expect) in 7 files

findings.title: AllResponseHeaders
findings.rationale: getAllResponseHeaders(){return this.responseHeaders} mock; drifted only by surrounding class size

findings.title: abort
findings.rationale: name-grouping CONFLATES unrelated functions: CancelToken arrow vs http.js emit-handler vs trivial XHR-mock stubs; not one consolidatable unit

findings.title: append
findings.rationale: FormData-mock append stubs (empty / push-to-calls) duplicated across form-data tests

findings.title: createTransport
findings.rationale: transport-mock factory returning {request(...)} replicated across smoke tests (drifted params)

findings.title: createCaptureTransport
findings.rationale: identical buildResponse capture-transport over a Writable, 4 smoke tests

findings.title: waitForRequest
findings.rationale: identical async poll-until-request helper across 4 browser tests

findings.title: flushSuccess
findings.rationale: byte-identical flushSuccess(request,promise) respondWith helper, 4 files

findings.title: bodyAsUtf8
findings.rationale: same Buffer.isBuffer?utf8:String(value) helper, JS+TS copies

findings.title: createFetchCapture
findings.rationale: same fetch-capture factory pushing Requests, replicated deno/bun smoke tests

findings.title: startRequest
findings.rationale: identical startRequest(...args) axios()+requests helper, 3 files

findings.title: startServer
findings.rationale: http.createServer+listen(0,127.0.0.1) promise helper; same logic, arrow-vs-function drift

findings.title: value
findings.rationale: identical value(){encodeInvoked=true;return 'inherited'} test descriptor in resolveConfig+buildURL tests

findings.title: CustomBlob
findings.rationale: CustomBlob test stub class duplicated (constructor stores parts); drifted by param

findings.title: stopServer
findings.rationale: server.close() promise helper; same intent, one adds listening/err guards (drift)

findings.title: ReactNativeFormData
findings.rationale: identical RN FormData mock class in 2 files

findings.title: noop
findings.rationale: const noop=()=>{} duplicated; trivial but genuinely the same

findings.title: setFormDataHeaders
findings.rationale: REAL lib duplication: same setFormDataHeaders in lib/adapters/http.js and lib/helpers/resolveConfig.js

findings.title: encodeUTF8
findings.rationale: identical encodeUTF8 percent-encoder, 2 files

findings.title: stop
findings.rationale: identical stop=(s)=>new Promise(r=>s.close(r)) helper

findings.title: Parts
findings.rationale: identical getParts(){return []} mock method

findings.title: createEchoTransport
findings.rationale: identical echo-transport factory, 2 files

findings.title: createProgressTransport
findings.rationale: identical progress-transport factory, 2 files

findings.title: normalizeHeaders
findings.rationale: identical header-normalizing helper, 2 files

findings.title: createFetchMock
findings.rationale: identical createFetchMock(responseFactory) helper, 2 files

findings.title: createPendingTransport
findings.rationale: identical pending-transport factory, 2 files

findings.title: runRequest
findings.rationale: identical runRequest(run) capture helper, 2 files

findings.title: requestWithConfig
findings.rationale: identical requestWithConfig(config) startServer helper, 2 files

findings.title: formatCommand
findings.rationale: same [command,...args].join(' ') helper, 2 files

findings.title: createTempFixture
findings.rationale: REAL helper duplication: createTempFixture in esm+cjs fixture helpers, near-identical

findings.title: handleResponse
findings.rationale: same handleResponse logging helper, esm vs cjs typing test (AxiosResponse vs axios.AxiosResponse)

findings.title: handleError
findings.rationale: same handleError branch-and-log helper, esm vs cjs typing test

findings.title: handleUserResponse
findings.rationale: same handleUserResponse logging helper, esm vs cjs typing test

findings.title: fn1
findings.rationale: identical fn1 template-string arrow in esm+cjs type tests

findings.title: decodeURIComponentSafe
findings.rationale: REAL lib duplication: identical decodeURIComponentSafe in lib/adapters/http.js and lib/adapters/fetch.js

findings.title: sleep
findings.rationale: identical sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(setTimeout) helper, 2 files

findings.title: finishRequest
findings.rationale: identical finishRequest respondWith helper, 2 files

findings.title: responseTimeout
findings.rationale: identical responseTimeout(){this.ontimeout()} mock method, 2 files

findings.title: finish
findings.rationale: identical finish() queueMicrotask mock method, 2 files

findings.title: start
findings.rationale: ReadableStream start(controller) enqueue helper; same shape, drifted by payload bytes

findings.title: cleanupTempFixture
findings.rationale: REAL helper duplication: cleanupTempFixture esm(fs.rmSync) vs cjs(guarded fallback) — same intent, drifted

dismissedByCodeweb.title: request
dismissedByCodeweb.note: 28-file mega-cluster of unrelated 'request' fns; codeweb keeps it OUT of findings (low) — correct, would be a giant false positive for name-match

dismissedByCodeweb.title: build
dismissedByCodeweb.note: codeweb refuted (rollup build vs toFormData build — unrelated)
